---
name: Maintenance task
description: Track refactoring, docs, test, infra, or production hardening work
title: "[Maintenance]: "
labels: [maintenance]
---

## Goal

What should be improved?

## Reason

Why does this matter now?

## Scope

What files, systems, or workflows are likely affected?

## Risks

What could regress or require special care?

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Change is complete and focused.
- [ ] Validation appropriate to the touched surface passes.
- [ ] Docs/status are updated if behavior or workflow changed.
